question: Berapa jumlah transaksi per hari dari kedua tabel digabung?
predicted_sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN t2.type = 'transaction_enose' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS transaction_enose_per_day, SUM(CASE WHEN t2.type = 'transaction_object_detection' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS object_detection_per_day FROM (SELECT device_id, DATE(detection_time) AS detection_date FROM transaction_object_detection) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT device_id, DATE(detection_time) AS detection_date, type FROM transaction_enose) AS t2 ON t1.device_id = t2.device_id GROUP BY detection_date
